title: Italy: EIB and Eni Sign â‚¬500 Million Finance Agreement to Convert Livorno Refinery into a Biorefinery
content: The European Investment Bank (EIB) and Eni have signed a â‚¬500 million 15-year finance contract to support the conversion of Eni's Livorno refinery in Tuscany into a biorefinery. The agreement was signed today at Eniâ€™s headquarters in San Donato Milanese by EIB Vice-President Gelsomina Vigliotti and Eni CEO Claudio Descalzi. Eni's project involves the construction of new plants to produce hydrogenated biofuels. Among the distinctive features of the project, in addition to the use of advanced technologies, there is the possibility of adapting the plant to also produce SAF (sustainable aviation fuel) in the future.
